pack.name: Hot Tub Maintenance
pack.description: Recurring hot tub care tasks for water quality, filters, and seasonal upkeep.
pack.author: Home Maintenance Manager

entity_requirements.name: Hot tub pump runtime
entity_requirements.description: Optional runtime or power source that indicates when the circulation or jet pump is running.

tasks.name: Test hot tub water
tasks.description: Test sanitizer, pH, alkalinity, and other water balance values.
tasks.instructions: Use test strips or a liquid test kit, then adjust sanitizer and balance chemicals according to product directions.

tasks.name: Rinse hot tub filter
tasks.description: Rinse debris from the hot tub filter cartridge.
tasks.instructions: Turn off pumps, remove the filter, rinse between pleats with a hose, inspect for damage, and reinstall.

tasks.name: Deep clean hot tub filter
tasks.description: Soak the filter cartridge in cleaner after regular use.
tasks.instructions: Soak the cartridge in filter cleaner according to product instructions, rinse thoroughly, and let it dry before reinstalling if possible.

tasks.name: Drain and refill hot tub
tasks.description: Drain, clean, and refill the hot tub.
tasks.instructions: Follow the manufacturer's drain procedure. Turn off power before draining, clean shell surfaces, refill, restore power only when filled, then balance water.
